ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Index for the record, used for data processing */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the rentals */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rentals (0: 2011, 1: 2012) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the rentals (1-12) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a working day (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: mist, 3: light rain, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalised temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalised feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Normalised humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Normalised wind speed */,
  "rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals on that day */,
  "avg_bike_usage" REAL /* Average bike usage per hour */,
  "max_bike_usage" INTEGER /* Maximum bike usage per hour */,
  "min_bike_usage" INTEGER /* Minimum bike usage per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental station */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of bikes at the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the rental station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the weather conditions */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the weather record */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation code */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season code (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "avg_rentals" INTEGER /* Average rentals in the season */,
  "max_rentals" INTEGER /* Maximum rentals recorded in the season */,
  "min_rentals" INTEGER /* Minimum rentals recorded in the season */,
  "avg_bike_usage" REAL /* Average bike usage per hour in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., federal, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_history" (
  "rental_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station used for rental */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was returned */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental record */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the user */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Additional suggestions or ideas from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_inventory" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike in the inventory */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is located */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in repair) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_inventory_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., system admin, station manager) */,
  "admin_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type/category of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_inventory ("bike_id")
)
